km.France or England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche是Sir William deBraunche of Gresham的兒子，於大約1175年出生在英國英格蘭。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche是Sir William deBraunche of Gresham的儿子，于大约1175年出生在英国英格兰。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braunche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Marcel.

French: topographic name or nickname from Old French branche ‘branch’ (from Late Latin branca ‘foot, paw’), of uncertain application (compare German Zweig ); or a habitational name from (La) Branche, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare also Labranche .
English: variant of   Branch  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Zweig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Isadore, Yochanan, Akiva, Arie, Aron, Elchanan, Hyman, Moishe, Moshe, Shimon.  German Gerd, Hans, Manfred, Reinhold, Arnulf, Herta, Kurt.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German zwīg ‘branch, bough, twig, graft’, German Zweig, applied perhaps as a nickname for a new member in a family, offspring or as an occupational name for a horticultural expert. The Jewish surname is artificial. Compare Branch .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche was born about 1175, in England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir William deBraunche of Gresham. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche est né environ 1175, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir William deBraunche of Gresham. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche wurde um 1175 in England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Sir William deBraunche of Gresham geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche è nato il circa 1175 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Sir William deBraunche of Gresham. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Brauncheは約1175年にイギリスイギリスでSir William deBraunche of Greshamの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche(은)는 대략 1175년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir William deBraunche of Gresham의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Sir William deBraunche of Gresham. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche родился около 1175 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Sir William deBraunche of Gresham. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Braunche nació aproximadamente 1175, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Sir William deBraunche of Gresham. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
